verse.verse_6: Inna nāsyi'atal-laili hiya asyaddu waṭ'aw wa aqwamu qīlā(n).
verse.verse_8: Ważkurisma rabbika wa tabattal ilaihi tabtīlā(n).
verse.verse_9: Rabbul-masyriqi wal-magribi lā ilāha illā huwa fattakhiżhu wakīlā(n).
verse.verse_10: Waṣbir ‘alā mā yaqūlūna wahjurhum hajran jamīlā(n).
verse.verse_11: Wa żarnī wal-mukażżibīna ulin-na‘mati wa mahhilhum qalīlā(n).
verse.verse_13: Wa ṭa‘āman żā guṣṣatiw wa ‘ażāban alīmā(n).
verse.verse_14: Yauma tarjuful-arḍu wal-jibālu wa kānatil-jibālu kaṡībam mahīlā(n).
verse.verse_15: Innā arsalnā ilaikum rasūlā(n), syāhidan ‘alaikum kamā arsalnā ilā fir‘auna rasūlā(n).
verse.verse_16: Fa ‘aṣā fir‘aunar-rasūla fa akhażnāhu akhżaw wabīlā(n).
verse.verse_17: Fakaifa tattaqūna in kafartum yaumay yaj‘alul-wildāna syībā(n).
verse.verse_18: As-samā'u munfaṭirum bih(ī), kāna wa‘duhū maf‘ūlā(n).
verse.verse_19: Inna hāżihī tażkirah(tun), faman syā'attakhaża ilā rabbihī sabīlā(n).
verse.verse_20: Inna rabbaka ya‘lamu annaka taqūmu adnā min ṡuluṡayil-laili wa niṣfahū wa ṡuluṡahū wa ṭā'ifatum minal-lażīna ma‘ak(a), wallāhu yuqaddirul-laila wan-nahār(a), ‘alima allan tuḥṣūhu fa tāba ‘alaikum faqra'ū mā tayassara minal-qur'ān(i), ‘alima an sayakūnu minkum marḍā, wa ākharūna yaḍribūna fil-arḍi yabtagūna min faḍlillāh(i), wa ākharūna yuqātilūna fī sabīlillāh(i), faqra'ū mā tayassara minh(u), wa aqīmuṣ-ṣalāta wa ātuz-zakāta wa aqriḍullāha qarḍan ḥasanā(n), wa mā tuqaddimū li'anfusikum min khairin tajidūhu ‘indallāh(i), huwa khairaw wa a‘ẓama ajrā(n), wastagfirullāh(a), innallāha gafūrur raḥīm(un).
